title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
IDBI Systematic Savings Plan (SSP) helps you to add your savings at your complete convenience. With your regular incomes, you can start saving any fixed amount from 500 to less than 3 crore every month. The amount as decided by you will be deducted every month from your savings account. 


  * The period of deposit can be from 1 year to 10 years
  * Deposit can be start with minimum amount of Rs. 500


SSP Plus offers Regular Savings with Principal + Interest protection Plus Complimentary Insurance Cover. 
  * Minimum eligible Instalment Amount : Rs.5,000 and multiples of 100 thereof


  * Minimum eligible tenor : 3 years and completed quarters, Maximum : 10 Years


[ For the detailed T & Cs and features of SSP Plus, ](https://www.idbi.bank.in/pdf/IDBI-Systematic-Savings-Plan-Plus.pdf)
Get a Systematic Savings Plan (SSP/SSP Plus) in 3 easy steps.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Recurring deposit helps you to grow your savings with the power of compounding. Invest systematically and see your savings grow
metadata.keywords: Recurring Deposit, recurring deposits interest rates, rd, rd account
